name: Infinity Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and treasury management services with industry-specific solutions.
description_long:
Infinity Bank is a federally insured financial institution that positions itself as a relationship-focused bank serving both personal and business customers. The bank is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, business checking and savings, business debit cards, and a full range of credit products. On the lending side, they provide business term loans, lines of credit, accounts receivable financing, commercial real estate loans, construction loans, SBA loans, and business credit cards. Banking services include online and mobile banking, remote deposit capture, ACH services, wire transfers, Zelle integration, and merchant services.

Infinity Bank distinguishes itself through industry-specific solutions tailored to niche business segments: escrow and title providers, healthcare practices, manufacturers, professional and legal service providers, property managers and HOAs, retail businesses, and wholesalers/distributors. They also offer specialized treasury management services including fraud monitoring, controlled disbursement, lockbox services, and sweep services for medium to large businesses.

As a traditional bank, Infinity Bank's primary value proposition centers on relationship banking and customized solutions rather than fintech innovation. The website emphasizes their understanding of specific industry needs and their ability to serve both small businesses and larger commercial clients. However, like most traditional banks, specific product details such as APRs, fees, minimum balances, and loan terms are not disclosed on the public website.
services: Business term loans and lines of credit
Commercial real estate and construction loans
SBA loans and accounts receivable financing
Business credit cards and debit cards
Online and mobile banking with remote deposit capture
Treasury management and fraud monitoring services
Federal and state tax payment processing
pros: FDIC-insured deposits provide federal protection up to applicable coverage limits
Comprehensive business lending options including SBA loans, term loans, and lines of credit
Industry-specific solutions for 7+ specialized business sectors (healthcare, manufacturing, legal services, real estate, etc.)
Advanced treasury management services including controlled disbursement and lockbox for larger businesses
Mobile and online banking with remote deposit capture (RDC) for convenient account access
Merchant services and payment processing integrated with ACH, wire transfers, and Zelle
Multiple authentication options for online banking security and fraud monitoring services
cons: Website provides no pricing information, fee schedules, APRs, or minimum balance requirements for any products
Limited detail on personal banking products compared to extensive business offerings; appears primarily business-focused
No information about interest rates on savings, checking products, or loan terms available on public website
Cannot assess competitiveness or compare offerings without disclosed rates and fees
Website contains minimal company background or history; 'About Infinity Bank' content is not detailed in provided excerpts

contact.address: 6 Hutton Centre Dr, Santa Ana, CA 92707

best_for: Small to mid-sized business owners seeking industry-specific banking solutions
Manufacturers, healthcare practices, and professional service providers needing specialized financial services
Businesses requiring treasury management, merchant services, and payment processing integration
diagnosis: Infinity Bank is best for business owners and entrepreneurs seeking a traditional bank with industry-specific expertise and full-service lending capabilities. Main caveat: The bank's website lacks transparent pricing and rate information, making it impossible to evaluate competitiveness without direct contact with the bank.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 6 Hutton Centre Dr, Santa Ana, CA 92707
